providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Remote-friendly browser sign-in without a localhost callback
Compatibility alias for xAI OAuth device-code sign-in

webSearch.apiKey.label: Grok Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Optional xAI API key for Grok web search; xAI OAuth or XAI_API_KEY can satisfy it.

webSearch.model.label: Grok Search Model
webSearch.model.help: Grok model override for web search.

webSearch.baseUrl.label: Grok Search Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Optional xAI Responses API base URL for Grok web_search and x_search fallbacks.

webSearch.inlineCitations.label: Inline Citations
webSearch.inlineCitations.help: Include inline markdown citations in Grok responses.

codeExecution.enabled.label: Enable Code Execution
codeExecution.enabled.help: Expose code_execution on active xAI models; true opts in when the active provider is known non-xAI, false disables, and missing provider fails closed. Requires xAI auth; xAI bills $5/1,000 calls plus model tokens.

xSearch.enabled.label: Enable X Search
xSearch.enabled.help: Expose x_search on active xAI models; true opts in when the active provider is known non-xAI, false disables, and missing provider fails closed. Requires xAI auth; xAI bills $5/1,000 calls plus model tokens.

xSearch.baseUrl.label: X Search Base URL
xSearch.baseUrl.help: Optional xAI Responses API base URL for x_search requests.

xSearch.inlineCitations.label: X Search Inline Citations
xSearch.inlineCitations.help: Keep inline markdown citations from xAI in x_search responses when available.

xSearch.maxTurns.label: X Search Max Turns
xSearch.maxTurns.help: Optional max internal tool turns xAI may use per x_search request.

xSearch.timeoutSeconds.label: X Search Timeout
xSearch.timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout in seconds for x_search requests.

xSearch.cacheTtlMinutes.label: X Search Cache TTL
xSearch.cacheTtlMinutes.help: Cache TTL in minutes for x_search results.

codeExecution.maxTurns.label: Code Execution Max Turns
codeExecution.maxTurns.help: Optional max internal tool turns xAI may use for code_execution.

codeExecution.timeoutSeconds.label: Code Execution Timeout
codeExecution.timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout in seconds for code_execution requests.

collectionsSearch.enabled.label: Enable Collections Search
collectionsSearch.enabled.help: Expose collections_search on active xAI models; true opts in when the active provider is known non-xAI, false disables, and missing provider fails closed. Requires xAI auth.

collectionsSearch.baseUrl.label: Collections Search Base URL
collectionsSearch.baseUrl.help: Optional xAI Responses API base URL for collections_search requests.

collectionsSearch.inlineCitations.label: Collections Search Inline Citations
collectionsSearch.inlineCitations.help: Keep inline markdown citations from xAI in collections_search responses when available.

collectionsSearch.maxTurns.label: Collections Search Max Turns
collectionsSearch.maxTurns.help: Optional max internal tool turns xAI may use per collections_search request.

collectionsSearch.timeoutSeconds.label: Collections Search Timeout
collectionsSearch.timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout in seconds for collections_search requests.

collectionsSearch.collectionIds.label: Collections Search Collection IDs
collectionsSearch.collectionIds.help: Restrict the search to specific xAI collection IDs (max 50). Omit to search all collections the xAI account has access to.
